inputs.titre: Écoutes au News of the World

reason: The image depicts a busy office environment with people working at computer workstations. While the overall look fits the general era, some elements are problematic. The computers are older models and the cubicle setup is fitting for the early 2000s, including 2011. The presence of a modern water cooler, flat screens, and the pristine condition of some equipment is somewhat questionable. The clothing, mostly suits, is acceptable. The newspapers also fit the theme. Overall it captures the right kind of environment, but has subtle anachronisms.
